Local Farmers Report Record Harvest This Season

Farmers across the region are reporting one of the best harvests in a decade, thanks to favorable monsoon patterns and improved irrigation techniques introduced last year.

Agricultural officials say wheat and rice yields are up nearly twenty percent compared to the five-year average, providing a much-needed boost to rural incomes.

Experts caution that continued investment in water management will be key to sustaining these gains into future seasons.
